hero.subtitle: Premium Travel Experiences · India
hero.description: Curated journeys across mountains, deserts, forests, beaches, heritage cities, sacred destinations, and hidden gems.

why.subtitle: Why Route Story
why.title: Travel Designed Around You, Not a Catalogue

cards.title: Curated Experiences
cards.description: Handpicked journeys designed around meaningful experiences rather than generic itineraries. Every stop earns its place in your story.

cards.title: Local Experts
cards.description: Insights from people who truly know every destination — not just the famous landmarks, but the lanes, the flavours, the people behind the place.

cards.title: Seamless Planning
cards.description: From the first conversation to the final farewell, every logistical detail is handled with quiet precision so your mind stays free.

ourStory.subtitle: Our Story
ourStory.p1: We started Route Story because we believed the travel industry had forgotten something essential — that the point of a journey is not to arrive somewhere new, but to return home changed.
ourStory.p2: India has an extraordinary gift for transformation. Its mountains silence you. Its deserts humble you. Its ancient cities remind you how briefly you exist. Our job is simply to make space for that encounter.

cta.subtitle: Begin Here
cta.title: Let's Create Your Next Story
cta.description: Tell us what you dream of — and we will craft the journey around it.

spiritual.name: Varanasi
spiritual.description: The spiritual capital of India, where ancient ghats meet the sacred Ganges at dawn.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Evening Aarti
itinerary.description: Arrive in Varanasi. Witness the mesmerizing Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat in the evening.

itinerary.title: Morning Boat Ride & Sarnath
itinerary.description: Early morning boat ride on the Ganges. Later, visit Sarnath where Buddha gave his first sermon.

itinerary.title: Temple Tour & Weavers District
itinerary.description: Visit Kashi Vishwanath Temple and explore the alleys of the silk weavers.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning at leisure. Transfer to the airport for your onward journey.

spiritual.name: Sikkim
spiritual.description: Prayer flags flutter over monasteries framed by the eternal snows of Kangchenjunga.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Gangtok
itinerary.description: Arrive in Gangtok and acclimatize. Evening walk on MG Marg.

itinerary.title: Tsomgo Lake
itinerary.description: Excursion to the glacial Tsomgo Lake and Baba Mandir.

itinerary.title: Rumtek Monastery
itinerary.description: Visit the grand Rumtek Monastery and local viewpoints.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Bagdogra airport for departure.

heritage.name: Rajasthan Royale
heritage.description: A land of maharajas, golden deserts, and painted havelis stretching to the horizon.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Jaipur
itinerary.description: Welcome to the Pink City. Check-in to your heritage hotel and enjoy a royal dinner.

itinerary.title: Amer Fort & City Palace
itinerary.description: Explore the majestic Amer Fort and the intricate City Palace.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur Journey
itinerary.description: Drive to Jodhpur. Evening visit to the vibrant local spice markets.

itinerary.title: Mehrangarh & Departure
itinerary.description: Tour the towering Mehrangarh Fort before your departure.

heritage.name: Hampi
heritage.description: A UNESCO World Heritage landscape of boulder-strewn ruins and Vijayanagara grandeur.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hospet
itinerary.description: Arrive and transfer to your hotel. Evening sunset view from Hemakuta Hill.

itinerary.title: Vijayanagara Ruins
itinerary.description: Explore the Virupaksha Temple, Vittala Temple, and the iconic Stone Chariot.

itinerary.title: Royal Enclosure
itinerary.description: Visit the Lotus Mahal, Elephant Stables, and the Queen's Bath.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning visit to the local markets and departure.

heritage.name: Odisha Temple Trail
heritage.description: Konark's sun chariot, Puri's waves, and Bhubaneswar's ancient temple clusters.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bhubaneswar
itinerary.description: Arrive and explore the ancient Lingaraj Temple and surrounding heritage sites.

itinerary.title: Konark Sun Temple
itinerary.description: Drive to Konark to marvel at the architectural wonder of the Sun Temple.

itinerary.title: Puri Pilgrimage
itinerary.description: Visit the sacred Jagannath Temple in Puri and relax by the beach.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer back to Bhubaneswar for your onward journey.

adventure.name: Leh Ladakh
adventure.description: High-altitude monasteries, azure lakes, and roads that touch the sky.

itinerary.title: Acclimatization in Leh
itinerary.description: Arrive in Leh and rest to acclimatize to the high altitude. Evening walk in the local market.

itinerary.title: Monastery Tour
itinerary.description: Visit the ancient Thiksey and Hemis monasteries.

itinerary.title: Pangong Lake Excursion
itinerary.description: Day trip to the breathtaking blue waters of Pangong Tso.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning transfer to Leh airport.

adventure.name: Rann of Kutch
adventure.description: The world's largest salt desert — blinding white, endless, and hauntingly beautiful.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Bhuj
itinerary.description: Arrive in Bhuj and transfer to the Rann Utsav tent city.

itinerary.title: White Desert Safari
itinerary.description: Explore the blinding white salt desert and witness a magical sunset.

itinerary.title: Local Villages
itinerary.description: Visit nearby artisanal villages known for intricate Kutch embroidery.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Bhuj airport for departure.

mountains.name: Shimla & Manali
mountains.description: Colonial charm meets Himalayan grandeur in these iconic mountain retreats.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Shimla
itinerary.description: Arrive in Shimla. Walk down the historic Mall Road and visit the Ridge.

itinerary.title: Kufri & Surroundings
itinerary.description: Excursion to Kufri for panoramic Himalayan views.

itinerary.title: Drive to Manali
itinerary.description: Scenic drive through the mountains to Manali. Evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley & Departure
itinerary.description: Visit Solang Valley for adventure activities before departing.

mountains.name: Darjeeling
mountains.description: Morning mist over tea gardens, toy trains, and Kanchenjunga at sunrise.

itinerary.title: Arrival
itinerary.description: Arrive in Darjeeling. Relax and enjoy the cool mountain air.

itinerary.title: Tiger Hill Sunrise
itinerary.description: Early morning trip to Tiger Hill for sunrise over Kanchenjunga. Ride the toy train.

itinerary.title: Tea Estates
itinerary.description: Visit the Happy Valley Tea Estate and the Himalayan Mountaineering Institute.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Bagdogra airport for departure.

luxury.name: Kerala Backwaters
luxury.description: Drift through emerald waterways on a traditional kettuvallam as herons glide overhead.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kochi
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kochi. Explore Fort Kochi, Chinese fishing nets, and the Jewish synagogue.

itinerary.title: Houseboat Boarding
itinerary.description: Drive to Alleppey and board your private luxury houseboat for an overnight cruise.

itinerary.title: Kumarakom Retreat
itinerary.description: Disembark and head to a backwater resort in Kumarakom for Ayurvedic relaxation.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer back to Kochi airport for departure.

coastal.name: Pondicherry
coastal.description: French boulevards, colonial villas, and a quiet spiritual energy by the Bay of Bengal.

itinerary.title: Arrival & French Quarter
itinerary.description: Arrive in Pondicherry. Walk through the charming French Quarter and White Town.

itinerary.title: Auroville Visit
itinerary.description: Spend the morning at Auroville and the Matrimandir for a spiritual experience.

itinerary.title: Beach & Cafes
itinerary.description: Relax at Promenade Beach and explore local bakeries and boutiques.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Chennai or local airport for departure.

coastal.name: Goa
coastal.description: Spice plantations, baroque churches, and sunsets that feel painted by hand.

itinerary.title: Arrival in South Goa
itinerary.description: Arrive and check into a luxury beachside resort. Evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Old Goa Heritage
itinerary.description: Visit the Basilica of Bom Jesus and Se Cathedral.

itinerary.title: Spice Plantations
itinerary.description: Explore the lush spice plantations and enjoy a traditional Goan lunch.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning beach walk and departure.

nature.name: Coorg
nature.description: The Scotland of India — misty coffee estates, waterfalls, and forest trails.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Coffee Estates
itinerary.description: Arrive in Coorg. Check-in to your plantation stay and enjoy a guided coffee tour.

itinerary.title: Abbey Falls & Viewpoints
itinerary.description: Visit the majestic Abbey Falls and Raja's Seat for panoramic views.

itinerary.title: Dubare Elephant Camp
itinerary.description: Interact with elephants at the Dubare camp and visit the Namdroling Monastery.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a final Coorgi breakfast before departure.

nature.name: Meghalaya
nature.description: Living root bridges, the wettest place on earth, and clouds you can touch.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Shillong
itinerary.description: Arrive and explore the 'Scotland of the East', including Umiam Lake.

itinerary.title: Cherrapunji Excursion
itinerary.description: Drive to Cherrapunji. Visit the Nohkalikai Falls and Mawsmai Caves.

itinerary.title: Living Root Bridges
itinerary.description: Trek to the ancient double-decker living root bridges in Nongriat.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Guwahati airport for your onward journey.

wildlife.name: Kaziranga
wildlife.description: One-horned rhinos roam through tall elephant grass as the Brahmaputra winds nearby.

itinerary.title: Arrival
itinerary.description: Arrive in Guwahati and drive to Kaziranga National Park.

itinerary.title: Jungle Safari
itinerary.description: Morning elephant safari and afternoon jeep safari to spot the one-horned rhino.

itinerary.title: Orchid Park & Tea Gardens
itinerary.description: Visit the Kaziranga Orchid Park and stroll through local tea estates.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Drive back to Guwahati for departure.

experiencesData.title: High-Altitude Expeditions
experiencesData.description: Trek across Himalayan passes, cycle through remote Spiti, or raft the Zanskar in its icy prime.

experiencesData.title: Living History Journeys
experiencesData.description: Walk through royal palaces, witness centuries-old craft traditions, and dine with local nobility.

experiencesData.title: Wilderness Encounters
experiencesData.description: Tiger safaris at dawn, elephant corridors at dusk, and birding in ancient forests.

experiencesData.title: Palace & Heritage Hotels
experiencesData.description: Sleep in converted maharaja forts, wake up to courtyard fountains, and be waited on by white-gloved staff.

experiencesData.title: Sacred Circuits
experiencesData.description: Char Dham, Vaishno Devi, the twelve Jyotirlingas — journeys that transcend geography.

experiencesData.title: Legendary Road Journeys
experiencesData.description: Manali to Leh, the Konkan coastline, the NH44 from Srinagar to Kanyakumari.

experiencesData.title: Romantic Hideaways
experiencesData.description: Private houseboat sunsets on Kerala's backwaters, candlelit dinners in Udaipur's lake palaces.

experiencesData.title: Journeys for Every Generation
experiencesData.description: Cultural immersion, wildlife thrills, and beach play — itineraries that delight everyone.

testimonialsData.quote: Route Story didn't book us a trip — they wrote us a chapter of our lives we will never forget.
testimonialsData.author: Priya & Arjun Mehta

testimonialsData.quote: Every detail was considered. Every moment felt deliberate. It was travel as it should always be.
testimonialsData.author: Kavita Sharma

testimonialsData.quote: We have travelled with many companies. None understood what we were looking for until Route Story.
testimonialsData.author: Rohan & Deepa Nair

testimonialsData.quote: The local connections they have are extraordinary. We experienced India like residents, not tourists.
testimonialsData.author: Ananya Krishnan

teamMembersData.name: Rishabh Jain
teamMembersData.bio: Rishabh oversees the overall management and operations of Route Story. From coordinating the team and developing travel packages to ensuring smooth customer experiences, he focuses on turning every travel plan into a well-organized and memorable journey.

teamMembersData.name: Vanshika Maheshwari
teamMembersData.bio: Vanshika manages customer interactions, itinerary planning, and community engagement. She helps travelers find experiences that match their interests while also leading Route Story's social media presence and brand communication.

teamMembersData.name: Khushal Chordia
teamMembersData.bio: Khushal manages Route Story's website, technical infrastructure, and digital systems. He ensures a seamless online experience, secure booking processes, and reliable platform performance for every traveler.

faqsData.q: How far in advance should I plan my journey?
faqsData.a: We recommend reaching out at least 8–12 weeks before your intended travel dates. This allows us time to craft a truly bespoke itinerary and secure the finest accommodations.

faqsData.q: Do you handle group and corporate travel?
faqsData.a: Absolutely. We specialise in curated group journeys, corporate offsites, and incentive travel. Contact us with your group size and we will design accordingly.

faqsData.q: What sets Route Story apart from other travel agencies?
faqsData.a: We are not a booking portal. We are storytellers. Every journey is designed around your personality, interests, and pace — not pulled from a catalogue.

faqsData.q: Are your journeys only within India?
faqsData.a: Currently we focus exclusively on India. We believe there are lifetimes of stories within this one country, and we do not wish to dilute that focus.

faqsData.q: What is your payment and cancellation policy?
faqsData.a: We require a 30% deposit to begin planning. Full payment is due 45 days before travel. Cancellation terms depend on the specific journey and will be outlined clearly in your agreement.

global.footerDescription: Crafting meaningful journeys across the Indian subcontinent. We don't just plan trips; we curate stories.
global.privacyPolicy: At Route Story, we take your privacy seriously. We collect personal information (such as name, email, phone number) only when you voluntarily submit it to request details about our travel packages. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except as necessary to provide you with services (e.g., hotel bookings, local transport coordination). All personal data is stored securely. We may update this policy from time to time, and changes will be posted on this page.
global.termsOfService: By accessing or booking travel packages through Route Story, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. All bookings are subject to availability. To secure a booking, a deposit must be paid as outlined in your travel proposal. Cancellations and refunds are governed by the specific hotels, flight operators, and local vendors involved in your journey. Route Story acts as an agent to coordinate travel arrangements and is not liable for personal injury, property damage, or delays caused by third-party suppliers.

destinationsPage.heroDescription: From the snow-capped Himalayas in the North to the tropical backwaters of the South, discover the diverse landscapes and cultures that make India a world within a world.

experiencesPage.heroDescription: We don't measure our success in journeys booked, but in stories created. Here is what our travellers have to say about their time with Route Story.

aboutPage.heroDescription: We are a team of explorers, storytellers, and local experts dedicated to showing you the India we know and love.

whyWeStarted.subtitle: Why We Started
whyWeStarted.title: Because India Deserves Better Than a Brochure
whyWeStarted.p1: Rishabh Jain spent two decades as a photojournalist travelling India's most remote corners — not for glossy magazines, but for the love of what he found there. He watched the travel industry reduce this extraordinary country to a list of 'must-sees' and 'package deals' and felt a quiet, persistent outrage.
whyWeStarted.p2: Route Story was born in 2018 from a single conviction: that the people who truly know a place — the dhow builders of Gujarat, the tea planters of Sikkim, the Brahmin cooks of Varanasi — are more valuable than any five-star concierge. We exist to make those introductions.
whyWeStarted.quote: Travel should feel like a privilege, not a transaction. Every journey should leave you slightly different from when you began.

vision.subtitle: Our Vision
vision.title: To Make India's Greatest Stories Accessible to Those Ready to Hear Them
vision.description: A world where the depth of travel matches the depth of the traveller — where journeys are measured not in kilometres but in conversations, in dawns, in meals shared with strangers who become friends.

mission.subtitle: Our Mission
mission.title: To Design Journeys That Honour the Complexity and Beauty of India
mission.description: Every itinerary we craft must pass a simple test: would we be proud to share it as a story, not just sell it as a service? If not, we start again.

contactPage.heroDescription: Whether you have a clear vision or just a vague dream of your next journey, we're here to listen and start crafting your story.
